name: Oslo Tiki Weekend 2026
description:
Oslo Tiki Weekend celebrates 5 years!
The biggest tiki event in Scandinavia, with concerts, movie screening, symposiums, marketplace and DJs.
THURSDAY (Vespa&Humla):
- Cinema: Talking Tiki (Rough Cut Screening)
- Tiki Quiz with Tiki Punks
- DJs
FRIDAY (Vespa & Humla):
- Concert: Ada Fasan
- Symposium: Jochen Hirschfeld - "Tiki, From Paradise to the Future"
- DJs
SATURDAY (Vespa & Humla / MIR):
- Tiki Marketplace w/ The Two-Tides
- Concert: Beach Bomb
- Concert: L'Exotighost
- Burlesque show featuring Gogo Shibari
- DJs
Get your tickets now at www.tikipunks.no.
